revision.text:
'''丁巳'''（ひのとみ、ていし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて54番目で、前は[[丙辰]]、次は[[戊午]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は火、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==丁巳の年==
==丁巳の日== ===[[選日]]=== 丁巳の日は[[八専]]の4日目（間日を除く）である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:丁巳]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''丁巳'''（ひのとみ、ていかのみ、ていし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの54番目で、前は[[丙辰]]、次は[[戊午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==丁巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って57が余る年が丁巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[57年]] *[[117年]] *[[177年]] *[[237年]] *[[297年]] *[[357年]] *[[417年]] *[[477年]] *[[537年]] *[[597年]] *[[657年]] *[[717年]] *[[777年]] *[[837年]] *[[897年]] *[[957年]] | *[[1017年]] *[[1077年]] *[[1137年]] *[[1197年]] *[[1257年]] *[[1317年]] *[[1377年]] *[[1437年]] *[[1497年]] *[[1557年]] *[[1617年]] *[[1677年]] *[[1737年]] *[[1797年]] *[[1857年]] *[[1917年]] *[[1977年]] | *[[2037年]] *[[2097年]] *[[2157年]] *[[2217年]] *[[2277年]] *[[2337年]] *[[2397年]] *[[2457年]] *[[2517年]] *[[2577年]] *[[2637年]] *[[2697年]] *[[2757年]] *[[2817年]] *[[2877年]] *[[2937年]] *[[2997年]] |}
==丁巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[4月]]が丁巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁巳の日== ===選日=== 丁巳の日は[[八専]]の4日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:丁巳]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:丁巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:丁巳]]

==丁巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って57が余る年が丁巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[57年]] *[[117年]] *[[177年]] *[[237年]] *[[297年]] *[[357年]] *[[417年]] *[[477年]] *[[537年]] *[[597年]] *[[657年]] *[[717年]] *[[777年]] *[[837年]] *[[897年]] *[[957年]] | *[[1017年]] *[[1077年]] *[[1137年]] *[[1197年]] *[[1257年]] *[[1317年]] *[[1377年]] *[[1437年]] *[[1497年]] *[[1557年]] *[[1617年]] *[[1677年]] *[[1737年]] *[[1797年]] *[[1857年]] *[[1917年]] *[[1977年]] | *[[2037年]] *[[2097年]] *[[2157年]] *[[2217年]] *[[2277年]] *[[2337年]] *[[2397年]] *[[2457年]] *[[2517年]] *[[2577年]] *[[2637年]] *[[2697年]] *[[2757年]] *[[2817年]] *[[2877年]] *[[2937年]] *[[2997年]] |}
==丁巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[4月]]が丁巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁巳の日== ===選日=== 丁巳の日は[[八専]]の4日目（間日を除く）である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Fire Snake-qq]] [[Category:丁巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:丁巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Fire Snake-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Fire Snake]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Fire Snake}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:丁巳]] [[Category:New]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=丁巳|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dīsì|w=ting-ssu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ sɨ|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=tɛŋ siː|mc=tæŋ si|oc-bs=tæŋ si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Fire Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 丁巳'''（ひのとみ、ていかのみ、ていし）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの54番目で、前は[[丙辰]]、次は[[戊午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==丁巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って57が余る年が丁巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[57年]] *[[117年]] *[[177年]] *[[237年]] *[[297年]] *[[357年]] *[[417年]] *[[477年]] *[[537年]] *[[597年]] *[[657年]] *[[717年]] *[[777年]] *[[837年]] *[[897年]] *[[957年]] | *[[1017年]] *[[1077年]] *[[1137年]] *[[1197年]] *[[1257年]] *[[1317年]] *[[1377年]] *[[1437年]] *[[1497年]] *[[1557年]] *[[1617年]] *[[1677年]] *[[1737年]] *[[1797年]] *[[1857年]] *[[1917年]] *[[1977年]] | *[[2037年]] *[[2097年]] *[[2157年]] *[[2217年]] *[[2277年]] *[[2337年]] *[[2397年]] *[[2457年]] *[[2517年]] *[[2577年]] *[[2637年]] *[[2697年]] *[[2757年]] *[[2817年]] *[[2877年]] *[[2937年]] *[[2997年]] |}

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの54番目で、前は[[丙辰]]、次は[[戊午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの54番目で、前は[[丙辰]]、次は[[戊午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。

Dậu]][[za:Sincceij]][[zh-min-nan:Sin-chá]][[zh-yue:辛酉]][[zh:辛酉]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=丁巳|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dīsì|w=ting-ssu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ sɨ|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=tɛŋ siː|mc=tæŋ si|oc-bs=tæŋ si}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Fire Snake also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 丁巳'''（ひのとみ、ていかのみ、ていし）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの54番目で、前は[[丙辰]]、次は[[戊午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[丁]]は陰の[[火]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==丁巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って57が余る年が丁巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''丁巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[57年]] *[[117年]] *[[177年]] *[[237年]] *[[297年]] *[[357年]] *[[417年]] *[[477年]] *[[537年]] *[[597年]] *[[657年]] *[[717年]] *[[777年]] *[[837年]] *[[897年]] *[[957年]] | *[[1017年]] *[[1077年]] *[[1137年]] *[[1197年]] *[[1257年]] *[[1317年]] *[[1377年]] *[[1437年]] *[[1497年]] *[[1557年]] *[[1617年]] *[[1677年]] *[[1737年]] *[[1797年]] *[[1857年]] *[[1917年]] *[[1977年]] | *[[2037年]] *[[2097年]] *[[2157年]] *[[2217年]] *[[2277年]] *[[2337年]] *[[2397年]] *[[2457年]] *[[2517年]] *[[2577年]] *[[2637年]] *[[2697年]] *[[2757年]] *[[2817年]] *[[2877年]] *[[2937年]] *[[2997年]] |}
==丁巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が3・8（十干が[[癸]]・[[戊]]）の年の[[4月]]が丁巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==丁巳の日== ===選日=== 丁巳の日は[[八専]]の4日目（間日を除く）である。

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905311]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=丁巳|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dīsì|w=ting-ssu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ sɨ|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=tɛŋ siː|mc=tæŋ si|oc-bs=tæŋ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Snake (丁巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: teiji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongsa (정사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Tỵ

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905311]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=丁巳|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dīsì|w=ting-ssu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ sɨ|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=tɛŋ siː|mc=tæŋ si|oc-bs=tæŋ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Snake (丁巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: teiji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongsa (정사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Tỵ

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905311]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=丁巳|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dīsì|w=ting-ssu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ sɨ|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=tɛŋ siː|mc=tæŋ si|oc-bs=tæŋ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Snake (丁巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: teiji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongsa (정사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Tỵ

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo ==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto ==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo ==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Snake (丁巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: teiji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongsa (정사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Tỵ

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Feuer-Schlange]][[hak:Tên-sṳ]][[ja:丁巳]][[ko:정사 (간지)]][[vi:Đinh Tỵ]][[za:Dingceih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-sū]][[zh-yue:丁巳]][[zh:丁巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905311]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=丁巳|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dīsì|w=ting-ssu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ sɨ|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=tɛŋ siː|mc=tæŋ si|oc-bs=tæŋ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Vuurslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Dĭng-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Feuer-Schlange]][[hak:Tên-sṳ]][[ja:丁巳]][[ko:정사 (간지)]][[vi:Đinh Tỵ]][[za:Dingceih]][[zh-min-nan:Teng-sū]][[zh-yue:丁巳]][[zh:丁巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905311]] Wikidata name: Yin Fire Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=丁巳|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dīsì|w=ting-ssu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ sɨ|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=tɛŋ siː|mc=tæŋ si|oc-bs=tæŋ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Fire Snake (丁巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: teiji ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongsa (정사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Tỵ

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo ==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo ==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto ==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as 丁巳''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wu Xing|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}).

==Months of Yin Fire Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] until the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Mangzhong]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Fire Snake== === 選日 === The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|丁巳|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).
